title: 5 pts
content:
5 pts
Partial Credit
Integrated dialogue is limited, but effective in the narrative. Conversations between characters or individuals weakly provide context, and insight, but do not effectively advance the plot. Some work is needed to enhance the overall storytelling.
0 pts
No Credit
Little evidence of dialogue that provides context, or insight, to advance the plot. The overall storytelling is absent.
10 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeRough Draft: Body Paragraphs, Descriptions
20 pts
Full Credit
Used descriptive devices like vivid language, sensory details, and imagery.
10 pts
Partial Credit
Some evidence of descriptive devices like vivid language, sensory details, and imagery are present; Focus on more describing than telling.
0 pts
No Credit
Descriptive devices are mostly 'telling' and provide little sensory details to engage the reader.
20 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeRough Draft: Conclusion
5 pts
Full Credit
Concisely and accurately provided a clear and informative overview of the story's central aspects.
context: From document: Week 2 Canvas Data Dump:  Week 2 | Overview: — chunk 20 (chunk 20/24)
